input.background: Table 13.3 lists birth weights of infants based on the smoking status of mothers.
input.question: Outline this study's design using a sketch of the type presented in $2.2$ (see Figure 2.1) to depict this study's design. [Comment: In contrast to the pets and stress illustrative example, these data are nonexperimental.]

output.answer: This study is nonexperimental ("observational") because the investigator did not assign the explanatory factor (smoking) to study participants.
